title: Create: Simple Recipes
description: Adds new recipes to expand the things you can automate!
body:
![overhead logo text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff8bcd8cd97bc632591266482eb5b09ae754a3d5.png)
Adds some simple yet effective recipes to the Create mod!
More about the recipes:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![2 flint, basalt and 250 mb of lava makes incomplete tuff!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f480276190b8f5b9bd3ed02dc0f5ee49739b6fe7.png)

2 flint, basalt and 250 mb of lava makes incomplete tuff!
  
![Washing incomplete tuff makes tuff!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6843ae64a701521093a370b4c60a5c3a7e3637f5.png)

Washing incomplete tuff makes tuff!

![Crushing down prismarine gets you zinc!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05f18e5752b437e2ec2719796936c36f4d310942.png)

Crushing down prismarine gets you zinc!

![Spouting 400mb of lava on limestone makes lapis lazuli!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0b68e98ab1d8595a44bc6e79abd4eccfbbb4a19.png)

Spouting 400mb of lava on limestone makes lapis lazuli!

![Any hoe will turn coarse dirt into dirt!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a68514502c800c42e22beae7ae2e290da547019.png)

Any hoe will turn coarse dirt into dirt!

![Haunt a slimeball into a spider eye!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77e19ac4ec446577d6ed008b29ffc16fcd67337d.png)

Haunt a slimeball into a spider eye!

</details>
